all_recipes.name: Pad Kra Pao
all_recipes.short_desc: A Thai basil stir-fry made with ground pork, chicken, or beef, garlic, Thai bird’s eye chilies, savory sauces, holy basil, jasmine rice, crispy fried egg, and spicy prik nam pla on the side.

all_recipes.name: Lemon Rice
all_recipes.short_desc: A simple South Indian-style lemon rice made with cooked rice, mustard seeds, cumin seeds, dals, curry leaves, turmeric, onion, and fresh lemon juice.
